prose:
**Benzene HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact integrals, no density fitting) via PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `.xyz` file (single-point, not optimized). SCF converged in 8 cycles. Frontier-orbital analysis computed with `nfrontier=3` (HOMO−2 through LUMO+2 reported). **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.6311 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). Supplementary results: HOMO = −7.0468 eV, LUMO = −0.4157 eV; Koopmans ionization potential = 7.0468 eV, electron affinity = 0.4157 eV, electronegativity = 3.7313 eV, chemical hardness = 3.3155 eV, electrophilicity index = 2.0996 eV. No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy. Command: `chemkit frontier-orbitals --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/benzene.xyz`. Output: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpfl33grf0/live.json`.</prose>
<parameter name="integrity_trustworthy">true
